name: Savory Skillet Meal
recipeIngredient: 4 medium Size potatoes, peeled and cut into quarters
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat into bite-sized pieces for serving.
2. Season with salt and dip in flour.
3. Brown in shortening in a skillet.
4. Place vegetables over top of meat.
5. Add mushroom soup.
6. Cover and cook on medium-high until steam escapes freely.
7. Turn to simmer and cook 50 minutes longer.
8. Serve.
